rulings.Case Title: BARBARA BARNES et al VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Defendants Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs¿ claim for punitive damages is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiffs do not now have and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with malice, fraud or oppression. Plaintiffs¿ responses to contention interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am, not 9:30am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE MORRIS et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY et al

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion for leave to amend complaint is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
